title: Secondary Adjustment — Transfer Pricing | Virtual Auditor | Virtual Auditor
description: Secondary adjustment under Section 92CE. Primary adjustment repatriation, deemed loan, interest computation. Compliance advisory.
bodyText:
HEADING1:Secondary Adjustment — Transfer Pricing | Virtual Auditor

What is Secondary Adjustment — Transfer Pricing | Virtual Auditor | Virtual Auditor?

Secondary adjustment under Section 92CE. Primary adjustment repatriation, deemed loan, interest computation. Compliance advisory.
Virtual Auditor provides professional secondary adjustment — transfer pricing | virtual auditor services across Chennai, Bangalore, and Mumbai. Our team of qualified Chartered Accountants (FCA), Company Secretaries (ACS), Certified Fraud Examiners (CFE), and IBBI Registered Valuers ensures compliance and accuracy.
HEADING2:Why Choose Virtual Auditor?

HEADING2:Our Approach

Our practice covers secondary adjustment requirements under Section 92CE of the Income Tax Act, 1961 (introduced by Finance Act, 2017). When a primary transfer pricing adjustment exceeds Rs. 1 crore, the taxpayer must repatriate the excess money or impute interest (SBI rate + 3.25% for INR, LIBOR/SOFR + 3% for foreign currency). Services include: secondary adjustment computation, repatriation strategy advisory, advance pricing agreement (APA) route evaluation, imputed interest computation and reporting, and representation before transfer pricing authorities. Non-compliance results in deemed advance taxable at 18-21% annually.
Why Choose Virtual Auditor?

Virtual Auditor brings a unique combination of professional credentials (FCA, ACS, CFE, IBBI Registered Valuer) and technology-driven service delivery. Our digital-first approach enables efficient engagement management with real-time status tracking for clients. We maintain strict confidentiality through secure document handling protocols and encrypted communication channels. Our team provides responsive support with dedicated relationship managers for each engagement. With offices in Chennai, Bangalore, and Mumbai, and a pan-India service capability through our digital infrastructure, we serve clients ranging from startups to listed corporations. Contact us for a free initial consultation to discuss your specific requirements and receive a customized service proposal.
